understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid, modify a carried piece's shape, color, and rotation by stepping on modifier tiles to match the requirements of goal cells, and then step on those goal cells to complete them. All goals in a level must be completed to advance, and all levels must be completed to win, while managing stamina and lives to avoid game over.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Moves cost 1 stamina; running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina to max; losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement and blocked directions are provided and must never be attempted. Modifier tiles change the piece: shape changers cycle the shape (0-5), color changers cycle the color (orange->blue->green->red->orange), and rotation changers rotate the piece 90 degrees clockwise (0->90->180->270->0). A goal cell only becomes activated when the piece's shape, color, and rotation all match the goal's requirements simultaneously, and stepping on an activated goal completes it.
